name: Voyager — PostgreSQL → YugabyteDB live migration
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client pv && curl -ssLo init-voyager-postgres/pscript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/paxtonhare/demo-magic/master/demo-magic.sh && chmod +x init-voyager-postgres/pscript init-voyager-postgres/prompt.sh && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml pull && wget -q -O /tmp/yb-voyager https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yugabyte/yb-voyager/main/docker/yb-voyager-docker && chmod +x /tmp/yb-voyager && sudo mv /tmp/yb-voyager /usr/local/bin/yb-voyager && mkdir -p voyager-data ybdb/backup && echo "✅ PostgreSQL Voyager exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml up -d && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → psql                (PostgreSQL source shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-export   (Voyager export shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-import   (Voyager import shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-wa       (Voyager cutover shell)"'
